verification_summary_text:
# Verified Candidate Sources v1

## Status

Scope: verify-candidate-sources-no-citation-insertion-no-claim-validation

This artifact verifies candidate-source records only. It does not insert citations, does not add references, does not claim literature support, does not claim validation, and does not claim manuscript readiness.

## Verification Summary

- candidate_source_record_count: 14
- verified_candidate_record_count: 14
- accepted_for_future_related_work_count: 11
- hold_for_review_count: 2
- rejected_for_current_related_work_count: 1
- citation_inserted_count: 0
- reference_added_count: 0
- literature_support_claim_made: False
- literature_validation_claim_made: False

## Boundary

Verified candidate records are not inserted citations. They are not manuscript references. They do not validate VF-H2. They only define which sources may later be used for bounded roles after citation-insertion review.

## Safety Boundary

Safe abstract toy model only. No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, no operational targeting, no wet-lab protocol, no infectivity optimization, no immune evasion optimization, and no host range prediction are introduced.

## Next Allowed Action

draft_citation_insertion_plan_from_verified_sources_no_claim_validation

verified_sources.authors: Juan A. Aledo; Silvia Martinez; Jose C. Valverde
verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not validate VF-H2, does not prove ledger_effect_size, and does not establish formal equivalence.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Graph-based discrete/parallel dynamical systems can be used as conceptual background for abstract finite graph update systems.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: VF-H2 validation; Viruse Fabric theory validation; formal proof; manuscript readiness
verified_sources.title: Parallel Dynamical Systems over Graphs and Related Topics: A Survey

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not validate VF-H2 and does not support any biological or real-world claim.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Finite dynamical systems provide a mathematical simulation framework relevant to discrete abstract systems.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: validation claim; formal proof claim; real-world relevance claim
verified_sources.title: Finite Dynamical Systems: A Mathematical Framework for Computer Simulation
verified_sources.venue: Mathematical Modeling, Simulation, Visualization and e-Learning

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not empirically validate the VF-H2 three-time coordinate.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Temporal networks provide conceptual background for time-indexed network structure and dynamics.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: three-time coordinate validation; real-world validation; biological interpretation
verified_sources.title: Temporal Networks

verified_sources.authors: Oliver E. Williams; Lucas Lacasa; Ana P. Millán; Vito Latora; et al.
verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not validate the persistent memory ledger or ledger_effect_size.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Temporal-network memory can be structured and nontrivial, supporting cautious conceptual framing of memory.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: VF-H2 validation; ledger_effect_size validation; real-network generalization
verified_sources.title: The shape of memory in temporal networks

verified_sources.authors: Renaud Lambiotte; Martin Rosvall; Ingo Scholtes
verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not show VF-H2 is a higher-order network model and does not validate VF-H2.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Higher-order models can conceptually frame path/history-dependent network representations.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: formal equivalence; validation; external empirical support
verified_sources.title: From networks to optimal higher-order models of complex systems

verified_sources.authors: Michele Starnini; James P. Gleeson; Marián Boguñá
verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Cannot be used for VF-H2 because epidemic spreading language creates biological/real-world boundary risk.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Could support abstract non-Markovian process background only.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: biological framing; epidemic analogy; host/pathogen interpretation; VF-H2 validation
verified_sources.title: Equivalence between non-Markovian and Markovian dynamics in epidemic spreading processes

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not establish VF-H2 as a cellular automaton class.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Could support the existence of memory-augmented cellular automata as a concept.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: citation insertion before metadata verification; formal equivalence; validation
verified_sources.title: Cellular Automata with Memory
verified_sources.volume_issue_pages: book metadata requires final catalog verification

verified_sources.authors: Genaro J. Martínez; Andrew Adamatzky; Ramon Alonso-Sanz
verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not prove or validate VF-H2 and does not establish formal equivalence.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Memory can alter dynamics in cellular automata, useful for toy/rule-system positioning.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: formal equivalence; VF-H2 validation; theory validation
verified_sources.title: Designing Complex Dynamics in Cellular Automata with Memory
verified_sources.venue: International Journal of Bifurcation and Chaos

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not imply VF-H2 is an echo state network.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Echo state networks can provide terminology-level background for reservoir/recurrent-state analogy.
verified_sources.title: Echo State Network

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not imply VF-H2 has reservoir-computing memory capacity.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Can support terminology around memory capacity in echo state networks.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: VF-H2 reservoir claim; validation; formal proof
verified_sources.title: Memory Capacity of Input-Driven Echo State Networks at the Edge of Chaos
verified_sources.venue: Artificial Neural Networks and Machine Learning - ICANN 2014

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not prove VF-H2 and does not validate the no-persistent-memory null control.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Can support methodological framing of null models as benchmarking tools in network contexts.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: proof claim; validation claim; neuroscience analogy overextension
verified_sources.title: Null models in network neuroscience

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not validate VF-H2 or establish empirical replication.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Can support general reproducibility-reporting motivation in computational work.
verified_sources.title: Moving towards reproducible machine learning

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not validate VF-H2 and does not establish independent empirical validation.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Can support general structured robustness/replicability discussion with domain caution.
verified_sources.forbidden_use: external validation; field-equivalence; empirical support claim
verified_sources.title: A Protocol for Structured Robustness Reproductions and Replicability Assessments
verified_sources.volume_issue_pages: article metadata to finalize before citation insertion

verified_sources.claim_not_supported: Does not validate VF-H2, biological relevance, or real-world relevance.
verified_sources.claim_supported: Could support broad artificial-life positioning if scope remains useful.
verified_sources.title: Complex Systems and Artificial Life: A Decade's Overview
verified_sources.venue: ALIFE 2019: The 2019 Conference on Artificial Life
